shift_label_meaning.0: before any shift of this type
shift_label_meaning.1: after first shift of this type
shift_label_meaning.2: after second shift of this type
shift_label_meaning.3: after third shift of this type

anomaly_label_meaning.0: normal point for this anomaly type

shape: Each Yloc array has shape (num_samples, sequence_length, num_event_labels).
